task: Check the comments on the PR and address them if necessary
Check the comments on the PR and address them if necessary
We want to be able to attach multiple sessions though. We just want to skip the amend if a duplicate trailer is already there (the same checkpoint id)
user_feedback_text: We want to be able to attach multiple sessions though. We just want to skip the amend if a duplicate trailer is already there (the same checkpoint id)

task: Check this comment: Agents that implement agent.TranscriptPreparer (e.g., OpenCode) may need PrepareTranscript to materialize/refresh the transcript file before it exists on disk. resolveAndValidateTranscript currently stats the path immediately, so entire attach --agent opencode <id> will fail even when the session is valid. Consider calling PrepareTranscript(ctx, transcriptPath) (best-effort) before the os.Stat check.
user_feedback_text: Check this comment: Agents that implement agent.TranscriptPreparer (e.g., OpenCode) may need PrepareTranscript to materialize/refresh the transcript file before it exists on disk. resolveAndValidateTranscript currently stats the path immediately, so entire attach --agent opencode <id> will fail even when the session is valid. Consider calling PrepareTranscript(ctx, transcriptPath) (best-effort) before the os.Stat check.
